win_condition: Village wins by guessing the word (if Werewolf fails to ID the Seer) or by identifying the Werewolf (if word not guessed); Werewolf wins otherwise
message: Werewords has no VP. If the village guesses the word, the Werewolf gets a chance to identify the Seer to steal the win. If the village fails to guess, they can still win by identifying the Werewolf. Quick rounds with app-managed timer.
